Wildly scary propaganda from this network and it goes to show that threats from the Trump admin is working to not accurately report the news in the war Israel got us into with actual ethos. I hate seeing the news not be the “news” in reporting the facts as they are to report.


Matt Duss (@mattduss)

NETANYAHU: Thank you Trump for giving me the war on Iran I’ve always wanted!

MADDOW: Who benefits from this war?

NETANYAHU: Thank you Trump for doing this for us! Amazing!

MADDOW: Is it the Gulf

Trump is the leader of the pedophile protection party. 

Trump is in the Epstein files 38,000 times.

Trump wrote to Epstein about their “wonderful secret.”

Trump flew on Epstein’s private jet (and lied.)

Just so that we are clear, Israel drops criminal charges on five Israeli soldiers who were caught on camera sexually assaulting a Palestinian detainee. But Israel will keep kids in prison for decades because they were throwing rocks? Make it make sense 🤦🏽‍♀️


The Associated Press (@AP)

BREAKING: The Israeli military says it is dropping charges against five soldiers who were accused of sexually abusing a Palestinian detainee. apnews.com/article/israel-ga…




— https://nitter.net/AP/status/2032
Instead of spending $1 billion a day on the War in Iran, we could use that to invest in the American people, not more endless wars.

The United States gave Netanyahu billions of dollars to fund the genocide in Gaza. 

Now, Netanyahu and Trump are teaming up for an unconscionable war with Iran. 

The American people are sick and tired of funding atrocities to appease Israel’s genocidal apartheid regime.
